markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To gather feedback on GrowthX's partnership with Smith.ai and discuss strategy adjustments since April.](https://fathom.video/share/7JyBzvGF-iTAq-52XnAKpMK5j1xx5-9V?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Current partnership satisfaction: 3/5, with expectations to reach 4/5 in the coming months](https://fathom.video/share/7JyBzvGF-iTAq-52XnAKpMK5j1xx5-9V?tab=summary&timestamp=63.0)
  - [Major concerns: subpar design quality, inconsistent formatting, and outdated persona information](https://fathom.video/share/7JyBzvGF-iTAq-52XnAKpMK5j1xx5-9V?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [GrowthX has expanded the team working on Smith.ai's account to four people and implemented a new internal AI-driven platform (Atlas)](https://fathom.video/share/7JyBzvGF-iTAq-52XnAKpMK5j1xx5-9V?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [A full artifact refresh is planned to address outdated information and align on correct personas](https://fathom.video/share/7JyBzvGF-iTAq-52XnAKpMK5j1xx5-9V?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

## Topics

### Partnership Satisfaction and Concerns

  - [Current satisfaction rating: 3/5](https://fathom.video/share/7JyBzvGF-iTAq-52XnAKpMK5j1xx5-9V?tab=summary&timestamp=63.0)
      - [Anticipating improvement to 4/5 in the next three months](https://fathom.video/share/7JyBzvGF-iTAq-52XnAKpMK5j1xx5-9V?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
  - [Major issues identified:](https://fathom.video/share/7JyBzvGF-iTAq-52XnAKpMK5j1xx5-9V?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
      - [Poor design quality (misaligned elements, unprofessional appearance)](https://fathom.video/share/7JyBzvGF-iTAq-52XnAKpMK5j1xx5-9V?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [Inconsistent formatting and capitalization in templates](https://fathom.video/share/7JyBzvGF-iTAq-52XnAKpMK5j1xx5-9V?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
      - [Outdated persona information driving content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/7JyBzvGF-iTAq-52XnAKpMK5j1xx5-9V?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)

### GrowthX Team and Process Updates

  - [Expanded team working on Smith.ai's account:](https://fathom.video/share/7JyBzvGF-iTAq-52XnAKpMK5j1xx5-9V?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
      - [Elvis (existing)](https://fathom.video/share/7JyBzvGF-iTAq-52XnAKpMK5j1xx5-9V?tab=summary&timestamp=359.0)
      - [Megan (new, former journalist)](https://fathom.video/share/7JyBzvGF-iTAq-52XnAKpMK5j1xx5-9V?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
      - [Two additional content managers](https://fathom.video/share/7JyBzvGF-iTAq-52XnAKpMK5j1xx5-9V?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [Implemented new internal platform "Atlas":](https://fathom.video/share/7JyBzvGF-iTAq-52XnAKpMK5j1xx5-9V?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
      - [AI-driven workflows for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/7JyBzvGF-iTAq-52XnAKpMK5j1xx5-9V?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
      - [Integrates multiple LLMs and image generators](https://fathom.video/share/7JyBzvGF-iTAq-52XnAKpMK5j1xx5-9V?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [Allows for human-in-the-loop editing at each stage](https://fathom.video/share/7JyBzvGF-iTAq-52XnAKpMK5j1xx5-9V?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### Content Strategy and Persona Alignment

  - [Need to focus on both high-volume and high-converting (though lower volume) keywords](https://fathom.video/share/7JyBzvGF-iTAq-52XnAKpMK5j1xx5-9V?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [Discovered outdated persona information in the system:](https://fathom.video/share/7JyBzvGF-iTAq-52XnAKpMK5j1xx5-9V?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
      - [Incorrect focus on IT directors and customer service managers](https://fathom.video/share/7JyBzvGF-iTAq-52XnAKpMK5j1xx5-9V?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [Actual target: business owners of service businesses and their marketing agencies](https://fathom.video/share/7JyBzvGF-iTAq-52XnAKpMK5j1xx5-9V?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [Plans to refresh artifacts and review published content for potential corrections](https://fathom.video/share/7JyBzvGF-iTAq-52XnAKpMK5j1xx5-9V?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

### Content Repurposing and Expansion

  - [Discussed potential for repurposing existing Smith.ai content:](https://fathom.video/share/7JyBzvGF-iTAq-52XnAKpMK5j1xx5-9V?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
      - [Business communications playbook update for AI receptionist product](https://fathom.video/share/7JyBzvGF-iTAq-52XnAKpMK5j1xx5-9V?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
      - [ROI calculator and other existing materials](https://fathom.video/share/7JyBzvGF-iTAq-52XnAKpMK5j1xx5-9V?tab=summary&timestamp=665.0)
  - [GrowthX capabilities for content transformation:](https://fathom.video/share/7JyBzvGF-iTAq-52XnAKpMK5j1xx5-9V?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
      - [PDF to article conversion](https://fathom.video/share/7JyBzvGF-iTAq-52XnAKpMK5j1xx5-9V?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)
      - [Podcast to article generation](https://fathom.video/share/7JyBzvGF-iTAq-52XnAKpMK5j1xx5-9V?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule full artifact refresh with Megan before the end of next week](https://fathom.video/share/7JyBzvGF-iTAq-52XnAKpMK5j1xx5-9V?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Review and potentially correct previously published articles based on incorrect persona information](https://fathom.video/share/7JyBzvGF-iTAq-52XnAKpMK5j1xx5-9V?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Explore opportunities for content repurposing using GrowthX's new capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/7JyBzvGF-iTAq-52XnAKpMK5j1xx5-9V?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Continue regular meetings between Maddy and Elvis, with potential for Andi to join](https://fathom.video/share/7JyBzvGF-iTAq-52XnAKpMK5j1xx5-9V?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Address design quality concerns with the newly hired design firm](https://fathom.video/share/7JyBzvGF-iTAq-52XnAKpMK5j1xx5-9V?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [Implement tighter quality control processes before presenting drafts to Maddy](https://fathom.video/share/7JyBzvGF-iTAq-52XnAKpMK5j1xx5-9V?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
